title: AniBench: reconstructive and causal capacity of human trials
description: Open, auditable software for compiling proposed and realized human-study geometry into six non-interchangeable capacity families: intensive, extensive, longitudinal, causal, personalized/sequential, and transport. The package includes typed unknowns, source-bound external comparator facts, anti-gaming tests, deterministic receipts, and a protocol-native design optimizer. No scalar public rank or biological-validation claim is implied by software release.
notes: Release metadata only. No DOI, deposit, publication date, ORCID, grant, or public-rank claim is asserted until the corresponding external readback exists.
